args.note: Attempted full refund for order ID 12345 (amount: 35000). Refund rejected: 'Refund not possible as payment status is FAILED'. Order lookup showed payment_status as 'PAID'. Discrepancy noted. Further investigation needed.

text:
I apologize, but I was unable to process the full refund for order ID 12345. The system indicated that the refund is not possible as the payment status is FAILED, which contradicts the order details showing the payment as PAID.

I have recorded this discrepancy in a case note for further investigation. Please allow me some time to look into this issue.
